message:
✨ Add web terminal with node-pty + xterm.js (#29)

- Server: terminal-manager.ts with node-pty for PTY lifecycle management
- Server: /ws/terminal WebSocket endpoint for raw PTY I/O
- Server: REST endpoints for terminal CRUD (/api/terminals)
- Server: Manual upgrade routing for /ws and /ws/terminal paths
- Web: TerminalView component with @xterm/xterm, fit addon, web links
- Web: Tab navigation (Sessions / Terminal) via Primer UnderlineNav
- Postinstall script to fix node-pty spawn-helper permissions on macOS

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
